h1: Custom Stress Relievers & Stress Balls for Branded Giveaways
metaTitle: Custom Stress Relievers & Stress Balls | Perfect Imprints
metaDescription: Order custom stress relievers and stress balls for corporate events, trade shows, and employee wellness. Low MOQ, fast turnaround. Get a quote today!
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR leaders, and event planners: custom stress relievers and stress balls are a practical, low-cost giveaway that resonates with any audience. Whether you’re staffing a busy trade show booth, assembling employee welcome kits for a wellness initiative, or sending a thoughtful thank-you to remote teams, these tactile items put your logo in hands that need a break.

Our lineup includes classic round stress balls, sport-shaped designs like soccer and football stress balls, and novelty shapes such as cars, cows, books, and stars. Each can be imprinted with your logo or message using screen print, pad print, or full-color dye sublimation. Most styles are available in a range of Pantone-matched colors, and many can be customized with a custom shape or texture for an extra brand impression.

Orders start at low minimums, with production lead times typically 7–10 business days after approval. We also offer rush service for time-sensitive campaigns. Request a quote online or call our team to discuss your next stress-relief promotion.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom stress balls?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by style. Standard round stress balls typically have an MOQ of 100 pieces, while custom-shaped stress relievers may require 250–500 pieces. Contact us for exact MOQs on your chosen product.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for stress relievers?
faqs.a: Most stress relievers can be screen printed, pad printed, or debossed. Full-color dye sublimation is available for certain shapes, allowing photographic or gradient artwork. Your account manager will recommend the best method for your design.

faqs.q: How long does production take for custom stress balls?
faqs.a: Standard production is 7–10 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders can be completed in 3–5 business days for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen carrier.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer pre-production samples for most stress reliever styles. Samples are typically shipped within 2–3 business days. Sample costs may apply and are often credited back on the first production order.

faqs.q: Are custom stress relievers safe for workplace giveaways?
faqs.a: Yes. Our stress relievers are made from soft polyurethane foam that is non-toxic and latex-free. They are designed for gentle squeezing and are not intended for children under 3. Always check your company’s safety guidelines before distributing.

heroAltText: Assorted custom stress relievers and stress balls in various shapes and colors with company logos, displayed on a table
